exploration_notes: Fixed the persistent database connection lifecycle in django/db/backends/base/base.py. The connect() method's close_at calculation and the close_if_unusable_or_obsolete() method's age check were made more explicit to properly handle CONN_MAX_AGE=None (persistent connections). The compound condition was split so persistent connections (close_at=None) get an explicit early return instead of relying on short-circuit evaluation.
